sn38.2:1.1:
1
"Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘arahantship, arahantship.’ What now is arahantship?"
sn38.2:1.2:
"The destruction of lust, the destruction of hatred, the destruction of delusion: this, friend, is called arahantship."
"But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the realization of this arahantship?"
"There is a path, friend, there is a way for the realization of this arahantship."
sn38.2:1.3: "And what, friend, is that path, what is that way for the realization of this arahantship?"
sn38.2:1.4: "It is, friend, this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is the path, friend, this is the way for the realization of this arahantship."
sn38.2:1.5: "Excellent is the path, friend, excellent is the way for the realization of this arahantship. And it is enough, friend Sāriputta, for diligence."
